name: PM Kisan
description: Provides financial assistance of ₹6,000 per year to eligible farmer families.
benefits: ₹2,000 is credited in three installments every year.

name: Ayushman Bharat
description: Provides health insurance coverage up to ₹5 lakh per family.
eligibility: Eligible families identified under SECC data.

name: Startup India
description: Supports startups through tax benefits, funding, and simplified compliance.
benefits: Funding support, tax exemptions, and incubation.

name: PM Mudra Yojana
description: Provides collateral-free loans to small businesses and entrepreneurs.

name: PM Awas Yojana
description: Provides financial assistance to eligible families for constructing or purchasing affordable houses.
eligibility: Economically Weaker Sections (EWS), Low Income Groups (LIG), and eligible beneficiaries.
benefits: Interest subsidy on home loans and financial support for housing.

name: Atal Pension Yojana
description: A government-backed pension scheme for workers in the unorganized sector.
eligibility: Indian citizens aged 18–40 years with a savings bank account.
benefits: Guaranteed monthly pension ranging from ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 after the age of 60.
